description: STING Seed Tag v5.9 — master label specification. Paragraph tiers 1..10. All BOOL parameters referenced inside tag-family Calculated Values are stored as TEXT in MR_PARAMETERS v5.3+ (Revit label formulas cannot reference YESNO params inside if(...)). Includes 99 threshold warnings with all columns populated. (v5.9: backfilled 12 CSV-only families and enriched 39 Revit-category entries with CSV-derived tier_1/2/3 rows. Total 138 categories covering 142 tag families. Naming note: Revit BuiltInCategory display names are plural — CSVs use singular family names — csv_family_alias field links the two.) | v5.10: tier_5 cost rows extended with 14 currency-neutral / payment-cert / variation params (Phase 184 P0.2 + P5) on 19 cost-bound categories; tier_7 fab rows extended with HVAC sizing audit-trail params (Phase 182-183) on 14 MEP categories | v5.11: +76 entries (Phase 187) — 58 healthcare + 9 LPS (6 base + 3 reuse) + 7 ARCH/STR variants (Curtain Panel/Mullion, Railing, Architectural Column, Structural Connection/Slab/Wall) + 2 Tie-In Pipe variants (FP Pipe, Gas Pipe). Aligns category_labels with the 204-family TagFamilyConfig (CategoryTemplateMap + variants + HealthcareVariantFamilies). | v5.12: removed 10 stale entries (Phase 187 dedup) — 4 plural duplicates (Curtain Panels, Curtain Wall Mullions, Railings, Structural Connections — superseded by singular forms) and 6 entries for families the creator never emits (Analytical Duct/Pipe Segments, Area Based Loads, MEP Ancillary, Temporary Structures, Wash).

calculated_value_templates._comment: Calculated Value templates that tag family labels plug in to. In MR_PARAMETERS v5.3+ every BOOL parameter referenced by one of these templates is stored as TEXT ('Yes'/'No') because Revit label formulas cannot use YESNO parameters as the condition of if(...). STING writers (TagStyleEngine.SetTagFormulaBool, ParameterHelpers.SetYesNo, PresentationModeCommand.SetBool, MigrateTagFamiliesCommand.SetFamilyBool) detect the storage type automatically and write 'Yes'/'No' for TEXT or 1/0 for legacy INTEGER-storage families.

warnings.description: LPS class missing — set I/II/III/IV per BS EN 62305-2 risk assessment
Air-termination mesh exceeds class limit (I=5×5 II=10×10 III=15×15 IV=20×20 m)
Down conductor count below class minimum (Class I=4 II=3 III/IV=2)
Cross-section below 50 mm² Cu / 70 mm² Al / 50 mm² Steel
Separation distance below s = ki·kc·l/km — services flashover risk
Earth resistance > 10 Ω — supplement electrodes or add ring earth
Equipotential bonding type missing — DIRECT / SPD / ISOLATING_SPARK_GAP required
Inspection overdue (12mo Class I/II / 24mo Class III/IV)

LPS class not assigned — required to verify natural-component thickness vs BS EN 62305-3 Tab 3

tag7_heading_style._comment: Controls the visual formatting of the TAG7 short tag heading (ASS_TAG_2_TXT) in both tier_2 and tier_3. These settings are applied at the tag family label level in Revit Family Editor.

tier_2_heading.note: Underlined in State 2 (Technical) — functional emphasis without visual dominance

tier_3_heading.note: Bold + Underlined in State 3 (Full Specification) — primary heading treatment

batch_control.description: Use the Set TAG7 Heading Style command to batch-update the heading format across all tag families. Supported styles: bold, italic, underline, bold+underline, bold+italic, all.
batch_control.applies_to: ASS_TAG_2_TXT label row in all STING tag families

tag_style_parameters._comment: Every STING tag family gets this exact set of type parameters. TagFamilyCreatorCommand.GetAllFamilyParams injects them on family creation; FamilyParamCreatorCommand (Add Missing Params mode) appends whichever are absent without touching existing labels.
tag_style_parameters.datatype_note: All BOOL parameters in this section are TEXT-stored in MR_PARAMETERS v5.3+ so Revit label Calculated Values can use them inside if(...). Helpers write 'Yes' / 'No' strings; values are read by comparing against 'Yes' / '1' (case-insensitive truthy) or '' / 'No' / '0' (falsy).

text_style_matrix._comment: 128 combinations — 4 sizes x 4 styles x 8 colors. Exactly one BOOL set to Yes per element type.
